positive: A stylized, minimalist portrait of a majestic lion's head and mane, rendered in strong black silhouette against a pop-art gradient background of electric turquoise fading into deep magenta. The composition is central and symmetrical, emphasizing the raw power and geometric flow of the mane. Use clean, graphic lines and high contrast for a striking, wearable aesthetic. Flat graphic design style, vector illustration quality, comic book art influence. Studio lighting, designed for print.
